# `_harness-smoke`

This fixture checks only the M0F harness plumbing:

- runtime manifest validation;
- raw and normalized input hashes;
- deterministic benchmark JSONL serialization; and
- the `validate`, `list`, and `smoke` CLI paths.

It is not origami evidence. It contains no crease pattern, folded state,
continuous path, collision certificate, layer order, or no-solution
certificate. Passing this fixture must never be displayed or reported as
`verified`, foldable, collision-free, or an M0F `GO` result.
